mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, event_type, event_source, payload_json, created_at FROM runtime_event WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO runtime_event (id, session_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, event_type, event_source, payload_json) VALUES (#{id}, #{sessionId}, #{workItemId}, #{workflowInstanceId}, #{workflowNodeInstanceId}, #{eventType}, #{eventSource}, #{payloadJson})
